name: daycares
description: KidsHub monorepo — unified parent+teacher app (kidshub), owner dashboard (kidshub-dashboard), and marketing site (kidshub-landing).

scripts.dev:kidshub: echo 'kidshub Expo app is being bootstrapped (Phase 3). For now, run the legacy snapshot manually: cd kidshub-legacy && npm install && npm run dev' && exit 1
